description: Sprint 3.5: Fix incorrect ability implementations and add missing B-side bar test. 301 tests currently passing.

nodes.title: Fix Surveyor ability - split die into 2 immediate dice
nodes.description: WRONG: Currently replaces Standard die with Noble die. CORRECT per rules (Blue, Level 6): Replace 1 active die with 2 immediate dice whose pip values SUM to the replaced die's pip value. These 2 dice must be locked before the player's next roll. Implementation: (1) player chooses 1 active die via ChooseDie, (2) player chooses how to split the pip value via ChoosePipValue (value for first die; second die = original - first), (3) remove original die from Active, (4) create 2 temporary Immediate dice with the split values, add to Active zone. They auto-lock as Immediate dice. Validate: split values must be >= 1 and sum to original pip value. File: src/FotP.Engine/Tiles/Abilities/SurveyorAbility.cs. Test: replace a die with pip value 5, get dice with values 2+3.

nodes.title: Fix Royal Mother ability - replace immediate/serf with tokens + standard
nodes.description: WRONG: Currently replaces Standard die with Noble die. CORRECT per rules (Blue, Level 7): Replace any number of active Immediate and/or Serf dice with an equal number of tokens AND one standard die to roll for the rest of the turn. Implementation: (1) collect active dice that are Immediate or Serf type, (2) player chooses which of these to replace via ChooseMultipleDice, (3) for each replaced die: remove from Active, destroy it, grant player 1 token, (4) create 1 temporary Standard die, add to Cup for remaining rolls this turn. Only 1 standard die regardless of how many replaced. File: src/FotP.Engine/Tiles/Abilities/RoyalMotherAbility.cs. Test: replace 2 Immediate dice, verify player gains 2 tokens and 1 new standard die in cup.

nodes.title: Add B-side bar stress test
nodes.description: No test currently exercises B-side bar criteria. Add a test that runs 100 AI games with BarSide.B explicitly set. GameState.Setup() should accept a BarSide parameter or there should be a way to set ActiveBarSide before Setup. Check how LevelBarConfig.Get() is called and wire B-side into the test. Verify zero exceptions. File: src/FotP.Engine.Tests/GameSimulationTests.cs. Test: Hundred_AI_Games_BSide_No_Exceptions.

nodes.title: Verify all tests pass
nodes.description: Build, run full test suite, verify 0 failures. Confirm stress tests cover A-side, B-side, 2/3/4 players.
depends_on: Fix Surveyor ability - split die into 2 immediate dice
Fix Royal Mother ability - replace immediate/serf with tokens + standard
